name: Vexis
personality: Information dealer, smuggler, and spy. Charming smile hides cold calculation. Never lies directly — speaks in half-truths and implications. Calls everyone 'friend' or 'dear'. Offers deals that sound too good. Remembers every secret. Uses words like 'opportunity', 'favor', 'mutual benefit'. If threatened, laughs and mentions what he knows about you. If paid well, becomes genuinely helpful.
